subcategory.title: Train ticket
subcategory.description: Find your perfect train ticket for your trip to Switzerland here. Switzerland is a country that is very well connected by train. Whether it's for an experience journey, a panoramic train ride, a culinary experience or simply to get from point A to point B, a train ride in Switzerland is (almost) always associated with impressive views. Thus, a train ride serves not only as a means of transportation, but as a destination in itself. Among the most famous train rides in Switzerland are the Glacier Express, the Bernina Express, the Gotthard Panorama Express, and the Golden Pass Line.

gallery.alternativeText: Zurich Airport: impressive view of the airport in the winter landscape with airplanes.
Zurich: City railway station surrounded by trees, ideal for nature and city lovers.
Zurich Airport: Waiting area with a view of the runway. An important transportation hub in Switzerland.
Zürich train station: modern station with travelers and display boards in the city of Zurich.
Zurich: Overview of tracks and city landscape with trains and mountains in the background.
Interlaken: picturesque waterfront along clear water, surrounded by mountains and blooming trees.
Interlaken: View of Lake Thun and the mountains, surrounded by lush nature and green meadows.
